entry.title: Re: Different Papersize between CR Designer and RAS
entry.content: Hi Ido, that was a typo, the rendering issues were fixed in SP 37. It was SP 36 that had the issues. Orientation has always done that, I don't recall why or if it was ever explained, it was just tsomethign you always had to do, I think it had something to do with DEVMODE->Framework limitations

entry.title: Re: SEN Reporting on individual simulations / recording
entry.content:
Hi,

The only thing I can think of that is even close to this requirement is the Simulation statistics that can be generated in Producer.  To get the details:

1. Open Producer for the Workspace that you are interested in and check out all content
2. Select Workspace > Statistics > Workspace Statistics
3. Click on the Projects tab and you can see statistics for your Simulations

Outside that, I'm not aware of a report that provides the number of steps for individual Simulations.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Different Papersize between CR Designer and RAS
entry.content: Thanks, Don.

entry.title: Re: crystal reports 2016: merge data across two (BTrieve)...
entry.content:
Hi Paul,

History lesson time...lol

Back in CR 8.5 days Pervasive managed the Native Btrieve CR database client dll. I don't recall when but at some point Pervasive sent the source code back to CR because they no longer wanted to maintain it.

SAP Developers did not want to either and focused on their ODBC Client.

So for simple links use the Native Btrieve ddf data source, for more complex structures as you noted use the ODBC Client.

SAP has no inkling to update the name client due to not many people use it, or at least reported to SAP.

I don't recall the last case SAP had for Btrieve, and I retired 2 years ago after 26 years of supporting Crystal Reports and focused on Pervasive...

Don

entry.title: Re: Exporting workspaces in Enable Now cloud
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm not aware of any tools to do this but it is a relatively easy task, other than dealing with some Resources.  For example, if the content in each Workspace has used different content templates and different Resources, such as Text Styles, it will take some work to standardize the content in the new Workspace.  If you import the Text Styles object from one Workspace, the styles may not match those from the other Workspaces, so some manual effort may be required to standardize the content templates in new Workspace.

Don't forget, there is the ability to import content from one Workspace into another in Manager.  Open the new Workspace in Manager and click the down arrow beside Import Archive and select Import from Other Workspace.  You can then select the Workspace that you are importing from and the content to be imported and then you can import it directly.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: Can we join this event remotely also. please suggest

entry.title: Re: Analytics Evolution : From Traditional Business Content to SAP BDC Insight Apps

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays onl...
entry.content: try using pixel as R&D noted rather 100% - 1440 pixel's = 1 inch

entry.title: G/L account generated during WIP calculation in HANA Public Cloud Event-Based Costing.
entry.content:
After applying Event-Based Costing, WIP calculation is generally posted to G/L Account DIGITS (Inventory WIP). However, in some orders, WIP is being posted to G/L Account DIGITS (Other Reserves) instead of DIGITS (Inventory WIP), and this issue continues to occur. We are manually adjusting the balance of G/L Account DIGITS through manual journal entries. Our concern is: Under what circumstances does G/L Account DIGITS (Other Reserves) get posted instead of Inventory WIP (G/L: DIGITS)? What actions should be taken to ensure WIP is correctly posted to G/L Account DIGITS (Inventory WIP)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: G/L account generated during WIP calculation in HANA...
entry.content:
WIP means input is greater than output.

Reserve means input is lower than output.

If you get reserve, it means you have done goods receipts earlier or with amount greater than goods issues and confirmation.

entry.title: Replication Model for Master Data Replication in CIM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I was trying to replicate exchange rate from S/4HANA to CIM and below error shows the valid date to and from. How do I change these settings? The master data on public cloud is from the year 1798. The replication does not work once I schedule the import to master data. Kindly help me to solve this.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to fix OOMKilled restart issue with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I has applied the bash script into our cloud commerce, it seems to be working well. I just want to share how I can facilitate the configurations with less mistake.

From HAC, run the script via Platform -> Scripting languages.

Before you run please be mindful 2 things:

- This script should be run after you have upgraded Tomcat. As Yannick shared we have to update manually when Tomcat version is changed.

- If you want to make the settings for different application nodes (eg: running this script on backoffice but to produce the settings for backgroundprocessing), the cores might be different. In this case you can check the number of cores in Dynatrace, under Infrastructure dashboard.

 

// recommendation from SAP
def MALLOC_ARENA_FACTORS = 2;
//If you would like to get number of cores automatically from impacted application nodes
def cores = Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors();
//If you want to generate for other nodes from any Hybris HAC
//def cores = 10;
def maxMallocArenas = cores * MALLOC_ARENA_FACTORS;

def catalinaOverridePlainText = new StringBuilder();
catalinaOverridePlainText.append("#!/usr/bin/env bash\n");
catalinaOverridePlainText.append("set -e\n");
catalinaOverridePlainText.append(String.format("echo \"Set MALLOC ARENA MAX to %d\"\n", maxMallocArenas));
catalinaOverridePlainText.append(String.format("export MALLOC_ARENA_MAX=%d\n", maxMallocArenas));
catalinaOverridePlainText.append("chown hybris /opt/tomcat/bin/catalina-original.sh\n");
catalinaOverridePlainText.append("chmod +x /opt/tomcat/bin/catalina-original.sh\n");
catalinaOverridePlainText.append("exec /opt/tomcat/bin/catalina-original.sh run\n");

//if you are going to run on local or on-prems it is under /bin/platform/resources/tomcat-xxx/bin
def originalCatalinaPlainText = org.apache.commons.io.FileUtils.readFileToString(new File("/opt/tomcat/bin/catalina.sh"), "UTF-8");

println "Your override MALLOC_ARENA_MAX script is going to be:";
println catalinaOverridePlainText.toString();
println "You might want to copy those lines onto ccv2 portal - under environment settings";
println "##############";
println String.format("ccv2.file.override.70.content=%s", Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(catalinaOverridePlainText.toString().getBytes("UTF-8")))
println "ccv2.file.override.70.path=/opt/tomcat/bin/catalina.sh";
println String.format("ccv2.file.override.71.content=%s", Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(originalCatalinaPlainText.toString().getBytes("UTF-8")))
println "ccv2.file.override.71.path=/opt/tomcat/bin/catalina-original.sh";
println "##############";

 

 Hac might creates you something like this

Now you need to copy content amongst hashes and apply them onto ccv2 portal. You might want to check the plain content again from https://www.base64decode.org.

Hope it helps,

Duc.

entry.title: Re: Bar chart in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi @YashminBehera , please check the variables of your app to identify where you are still pulling in ALL data, without paging. Especially check the DATA VARIABLES.

entry.title: Re: Using RAP to build Side-by-Side extensions

entry.title: J1B3N-reprint Danfe DRC
entry.content:
Hello!

We are implementing DRC to replace GRC NF-e. One of the new things delivered by SAP was the B2B event sending out XML and DANFE automatically that was a Z solution before. DANFE layout has been implemented successfully, however, in J1BNFE still exists the functionality to reprint DANFW that calls another DANFE form (old Z implemented years ago in our company). I’d like to understand the best practice or solution, is there anyone calling the DANFE via API in DRC to be displayed in ECC?

entry.title: Re: Upgrading BW/4HANA 2.0 / BPC 11.1 to BW/4HANA 2023 /...
entry.content:
To install BPC component, please refer to this help page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BPC_VERSION_BW4HANA/c2c861bca6d3467ca49e758bcc6abdfb/094b4ad5f5a54a52a1b874abaeddd345.html

For existing BPC data, there is no need to migrate for in place upgrade( in the same server), everything should work right after upgrade. If you installed a new server for BW/4 2023/BPC 2021, you need to backup environment and restore it with BPC backup and restore tool.

entry.title: Additional Information in Billing Forms
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Currently we are having enhancement to billing form to add additional data that is derived from the billing header text - Customer Address Info . User expected to have a form with header section on all pages, but as checked with technical team, there's some limitation in form design tools.

These are two scenarios that we have explained to end user

Scenario 1 (please refer to the attachment)

FIXED header line items : can show header on each page, but needs to define max line counts.

Lets say if we define max 6 line items :

  • if user maintain only 3 lines, there will be 3 additional spaces after
  • if user maintain only 2 lines, there will be 4 additional spaces after

RESULTS : not acceptable by end user because theres gap/spaces/line break for < 6 lines

 

Scenario 2  (please refer to the attachment)

Dynamic header line items : if second page has no material item, the header section can not be shown on the form.

With this method, spaces/line break can be adjusted automatically regardless of how many additional line counts, but the consequence is if there's no line item in second page, the header can not be shown.

RESULTS : not acceptable by end user because theres no header section in second page

 

Need your advise on how to have all headers on each page without having to define maximum number of lines for additional text. Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to restrict MMBE and MB52 transactions with SLOC...
entry.content: I try, but not working.

entry.title: Re: Can we report on the data published from Compensation...
entry.content:
Hi @Roman_Cruz ,

You can see which employees have been published by running the Employee Central Publish Report access though the template > Complete Compensation Cycle> Publish Data> Employee Central Publish Report. The output of the report should include the worksheet name.

Hope this helps.

Christian

entry.title: Re: Red lines in Inventory Value Report SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the following online help link and read the last part of the page to check where red lines and N/A rows in the report:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/864efbf78639421bb2fdbe3fbb896522.html

kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Create PO from PR by Process Purchase Requisitions (V2)
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to create PO from PR with NL001(Non-stock material) and SM0001 (Service product).

In "Process Purchase Requisitions (V2) ", I can create a PO if I select only non-stock material or only a service product. However, when I select both types of items together, the system does not allow me to proceed.

 

However, I can create PO from PR successfully using the "Create Purchase Order - Advanced" app.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @gregory_mayorga_gc ,

Thank you for the feedback, and I appreciate your feedback. Happy to see that the blogs are helping. 

I have tried to improve the image quality but nothing worked for me. I will explore the option. However, quickly fix it by clicking on the image to see the bigger size in case you want more details on it. 

For the other question, one subaccount can connect to only one production system.

For example, the current subaccount can connect to 1 SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, 1 SAP SFSF, 1 Ariba, 1 Concur, etc. If you want to set up Joule for another tenant of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, it has to be another subaccount. 

More info is added here: https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/6189c8655c484916bb8eb767126a653a/782a97f290794ca09080da54c5f230de.html Hope this helps. 

We are working on the blog to show how to include systems, stay tuned. 

Regards.

Nagesh

entry.title: BADI / ENH / User-Exit that hits very first when inbound IDOCs get into Receiver system? OB too?
entry.content:
Hello,

Reservation (RKPF and RESB) IDOC is sending by ECC_Sender_sys to ECC_Receiver_Sys, but when IDOC comes into Receiver sys some of the data is overwriting on inbound IDOC. Its custom message type, custom basic type, custom Inbound IDOC posting FM.

Pls. let us know the BADI / ENH / User-Exit that comes first when the Inbound IDOC comes into Receiver sys. From Call Stack we saw that the data already getting over writing by the time of  FMs of  IDOC_START_INBOUND, IDOC_INPUT; BADI IDOC_DATA_WRAPPER.

Same way, pls. let us know the very last BADI / ENH / User-Exit that hits before the outbound IDOC sent out by sender sys?

entry.title: Re: SAC Data action- ForEach
entry.content: I would suggest you to give some example based on your data and explain what result you would like to achieve.

entry.title: Re: Creating a Crystal Report Letter Template to display...
entry.content:
It sounds like you need to turn on the Detail section option of 'Format with Multiple Columns'.  Please search the online help for the topic of ''Layout tab (Section Expert)":
------------------------------------
"The Layout tab appears when you have the details section selected and the Format with Multiple Columns box is checked on the Common tab.

Use the Layout tab to set up your report in a multi-column format. That is, instead of having the data print straight down the page, you can set up multiple columns and have the data flow from column to column. You can also have your data print across then down the page, printing one record in each column, then printing a second record in each column, then a third, and so on. The dialog box is divided into four smaller boxes... "

entry.title: Re: SAP BW question
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible to install the HANA DB instance on RHEL Linux OS and the application server instance on Oracle Solaris 11.3 SPARC OS. Here are the details:

  1. HANA DB Instance on RHEL Linux OS:
    • SAP HANA can be installed on Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) 8 or 9. The installation process involves preparing the RHEL system, enabling the necessary repositories, and using the SAP Software Provisioning Manager (SWPM) to install the HANA database.
  2. Application Server Instance on Oracle Solaris 11.3 SPARC OS:
    • Oracle Solaris 11.3 supports the installation of application server instances. The process includes setting up the Oracle Solaris environment, creating an install service for SPARC clients, and using the appropriate installation commands to deploy the application server.

By combining these two systems, you can leverage the strengths of both RHEL and Oracle Solaris for your SAP BW/4HANA or BW on PERSON_NAME system.

If you have any more questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠

entry.title: Re: Function of this report RDDEXECL
entry.content: Did you find the answer to your question?

entry.title: Re: What is SAP RISE ? Technical Architect Perspective to ABAP, migrations-options, tools
entry.content: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/rules-of-engagement: "If you want to publish content that was helped/created by GenAI, you must add the user tag GenAI Assisted Content. For content where it's not possible to add a user tag (e.g., answers), you must include this statement: "GenAI was used to help generate this content."

entry.title: MRP Run doesnt calculate to 0 available QTY
entry.content:
Hey Guys, 

we are facing some confusing calculations inside MRP Run so we are using WB weekly lot size as we have one order for one week without BOM Explosion 

normally the MRP Run then checks for replenishment lead time and try to get it to an 0 availably QTY. 

But for some reason for many article it doesnt all articles have the same MRP Data 

planning strategy 40

only difference is the leads time sometimes but also if I have an lead time of 77 Article A is correct and Article B is still incorrect 

 its just using planned requirements from the future and I ask myself why? 

Our goal would be that it only checks net requirements until lead time and try to get it to 0 available stock including the safety stock. 

Could you help out?

entry.title: Enhanced SAP Notes Recommendations in Maintenance Planner: AI-Based Ranking for Smarter Insights
entry.content:
Keeping SAP systems updated and secure is essential. The "View Recommended Notes" feature in Maintenance Planner provides a tailored list of SAP Notes based on the system's current status, helping ensure systems stay up-to-date, secure, and compliant with evolving business and legal requirements.

Proactively implementing SAP Notes can be beneficial in many ways. For instance, Security Notes help safeguard your systems. High-priority Notes should be reviewed for relevance, while Legal Change  ensure compliance with new regulations. However, managing SAP Notes, especially across multiple systems, can be both overwhelming and time-consuming. To streamline this process, we are enhancing the Notes list with a ranked view—making it easier for you to prioritize and identify the most critical SAP Notes first.

Intelligent Ranking for Prioritizing SAP Notes

Ranking helps in identifying and prioritizing the most relevant SAP Notes likely to be applicable to your system. This ranking is determined by artificial intelligence, based on the SAP Notes already implemented within your system.

The criteria for ranking include:

  • Text Similarity: SAP Notes with content that closely resembles already implemented notes.
  • ABAP Dictionary Object: Notes involving modifications to the same ABAP Dictionary objects as the implemented notes.
  • Prerequisites: Notes with prerequisites that reference already implemented notes.
  • System Similarity: Notes that are implemented in similar systems.

The ranking results for recommended SAP Notes are dynamic and continuously recalculated based on new or updated SAP Notes and system changes.

Select "Top Ranked" Notes 

Sort based on Ranking to view a ranked list.

The AI-Based Top Ranked View in Maintenance Planner simplifies the prioritization of SAP Notes recommendations, reduces manual effort, and optimizes the process. For more information, please refer SAP Help and  blog outlining the View Recommended Notes functionality.

Try out the new feature today and experience the difference! 🚀

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP BTP SDK for Android (v24.4.3) After App Termination and Re-launch

entry.title: Re: Payment Wizard didn't generate any documents

Hi Tiago,

please set uo a value in the max outgoing amount, that is high enough to cover the sum of the outgoing payments, like 99.000.000.000. If it is empty or to low. payments wouldn*t be recognized

Have a look

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/44eae34abbc903fde10000000a1553f6.html

entry.title: Account creation automation in C4C Version 1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have client requirement where in they need Account creation automation process. They want process like, On creation of an Account in c4c, email notification should be trigger to concern Manager with deep link. Manager will verify the account request and approved/reject in system. Once  account getting approved, next email will trigger to the account owner who created the account after that he/she can able to use that account in sales process like lead/opportunity. They won't be able to use that account until or unless not getting approved my concern manager or other user.

I have checked above development by standard functionality which is not possible. Can we develop this with the help of SDK? If we can develop by SDK, could you please guide me on this in detail steps?

Thank you!!!

 

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP BTP SDK for Android (v24.4.3) After App Termination and Re-launch
entry.content: Could you share the nature of your application? Do you use WebView for authentication, or is it primarily for loading a UI5 application from the backend? If it's for browsing a backend UI5 app, do you route the request through Mobile Services Destination? Do you use our flows or flowsjc package to register our device to Mobile Service?

entry.title: Re: Show UDF from SAP B1 in SAP Customer Checkout Sales s...
entry.content: Hi @RicardoRenteria, thanks!

entry.title: maintain inbound delivery showing blocked status
Re: IBP RTI: Queue is Locked
entry.content: Hi @brandon_ronning2, do you get the same error when trying to browse the first unit from the top of the queue (the one that has Unit Blocked status?). Usually this error is displayed to the ones that are under Unit Locked status (2nd+ unit from the queue). If yes, then I would suggest you raise an OSS note for SAP to have a look at your system setup.

entry.title: FMS Correction into SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear team,

SELECT $[RDR1.U_PriceAfter] - (SELECT SUM(T0.VatSum) FROM RDR1 T0 WHERE T0.DocEntry = $[RDR1.DocEntry])

 

I need to minus VATSUM from the row level UDF named : U_PriceAfter

Please advice on it.

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: Create a Sales order screen for flight booking.
entry.content:
Hi, 

List of BADI fos sales order You can find here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/7b24a64d9d0941bda1afa753263d9e39/66a2f4107e754be68a458408eb332d91.html

Additionally if You are working on Public Sales Cloud You can search from this link https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/onstackextensibility/badi

If You Want manipulate fields on screen You can use below BADI's:

  • Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Headers(SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_HEAD)
  • Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Items(SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_ITEM)

I Hope this will solved Your problem.

entry.title: Re: How to freeze a key figure for period of time?
entry.content: ..and that is why you should not use ChatGPT for any SAP technical related queries. At least not yet .

entry.title: Re: Documentation for sap.fe.core.controls.FilterBar in S...
entry.content: Thank you for sharing the documentation. According to the official SAP UI5 documentation, the FilterBar control should provide the getSelectionVariant method. However, when I retrieve my FilterBar using the Extension API and the byId method in the extension controller, this method is not available, as shown in the attached code. const oExtensionAPI = this.base.getExtensionAPI(); const oGlobalFilter = oExtensionAPI.byId('myfilterid'); And the resulting error is: Uncaught TypeError: oGlobalFilter.getSelectionVariant is not a function. This makes me think that, these two are not the same elements. So I think that the documentation you have provided me is for different filterbar, or perhaps I am overlooking something.

Regarding to your concern, I would like you to take a look at Notes below.

3542327 - Configuring SAP ABAP Systems to Support SAP HANA DB Secondary Connections

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error while importing iFlow
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to transport an iFlow, but when I tried to import it into the target environment using Cloud Transport Management, the following error occurred, and the transport failed.

Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Not Found

Could you please tell me the cause and how to resolve it?

 

The Check Connection results for each Destination (Cloud Transport Management Service, ContentAgentService, ProcessIntegrationRuntime, and the Cloud Foundry API Endpoint of the target environment) are as follows.

 

If there is any missing information, please let me know.

Thanks in advance.

Ryoki

entry.title: Re: Sales Promotions & Sales Deals Configurations and Applying Multiple Deals to an Order

entry.title: AFC- Standard Closing Comprehensive list for Manufacturing industry
entry.content:
Our client is interested in understanding the best practices for AFC in the manufacturing industry and identifying key tasks to consider while re-engineering their ECC-based Excel tasks for migration to AFC-S/4HANA Cloud. While SAP provides standard tasks, our primary focus is on obtaining a comprehensive list of manufacturing-specific tasks to establish a new AFC template.

Any pointers /guidance will be helpful

entry.title: Re: Sales Promotions & Sales Deals Configurations and Applying Multiple Deals to an Order
entry.content: Thank you for your detail explanations

entry.title: SAP HANA Cloud Forced Upgrades & Scheduled Maintenance Windows
entry.content:
Maintenance Windows

 SAP HANA Cloud undergoes scheduled maintenance to ensure optimal performance and security. Typically, maintenance windows are planned on a weekly basis, but these are only utilized in exceptional circumstances to minimize disruptions. Major activities, such as significant software upgrades or system enhancements, are reserved for designated major upgrade windows. During these periods, SAP HANA Cloud engineers perform essential tasks like patch installations, security updates, and performance tuning. It's noteworthy that not all maintenance activities necessarily result in downtime. This proactive approach ensures that the cloud infrastructure remains robust, secure, and up-to-date, providing a reliable environment for users. Find out more information here.

Forceful Upgrade of SAP HANA Cloud Instance

A forced upgrade is a process where SAP automatically upgrades a HANA database version to a more recent release. 

Expected Behaviour: 

During a forced upgrade, an in-place upgrade is executed, leading to a restart of the affected instance. As the system re-establishes its in-memory structures, a performance ramp-up period is expected. This process does not facilitate an off-place upgrade or utilize a shadow process, commonly referred to as a near-zero downtime upgrade, despite these modes being configured in SAP HANA Cloud Central. Consequently, this enforced upgrade approach results in complete downtime, contrasting with more seamless upgrade methods.

Primary Objectives:
  • Security: Enhance protection against vulnerabilities.
  • Functionality: Introduce new features.
  • Efficiency: Improve performance and workflow.
Scheduling and Notification:
  • Maintenance Window: Automatic upgrades occur within a predefined maintenance window.
  • Notification: Customers are informed in advance about the maintenance window.
  • Tool: Use the Cloud System Notification Subscriptions tool (CSNS) to configure notifications regarding forced upgrades as well as planned and unplanned downtimes
  • Use of MUW: SAP typically schedules forced upgrades during the regular major upgrade window (MUW).
Exceptional Cases:
  • Severe Incidents: SAP may deviate from the MUW schedule for immediate action in case of critical issues affecting customers.
Out-of-Maintenance Versions:
  • Upgrade to New QRC: SAP will perform a forced upgrade for instances running on out-of-maintenance Quick Release Cycle (QRC) versions during a MUW.
  • MUW Selection: The specific MUW will be chosen based on the overall maintenance load.
  • No Guarantee: An immediate upgrade in the next MUW after the end of maintenance is not guaranteed.
Customer Responsibility:
  • Proactive Upgrades: Customers are advised not to rely solely on forced upgrades and should proactively upgrade their systems in advance. Upgrading in a regular cycle provides several benefits:
    1. You can choose the date of the upgrade.
    2. You can choose to upgrade without the need to restart the instance (you can avoid downtime using the option of a near-zero downtime upgrade).
    3. You can test new features and changes introduced in the new QRC version in advance.
    4. You can keep your instances up-to-date with the latest security patches and bug fixes.

Update Releases and System Support 

Release Cycle:
- New version of SAP HANA Cloud released every three months.
- Releases occur at the end of every quarter.

Version Identification:
- Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) reference used for identification.
- Format: QRC <Quarter>/<Year> (e.g., QRC 1/2024).
- Technical version number format: <Year>.<Calendar Week>.<Patch Number> (e.g., 2024.2.3).

Maintenance Period:
- Each QRC update is maintained for seven months.
- Software patches for bug fixes and improvements are available during this period.

Patch Installation:
- Patches can be installed by administrators at their convenience.
- Patches are accessible from within SAP HANA Cloud Central.

Support After Maintenance Period:
- After seven months, a QRC is still supported but no longer maintained with patches.
- To use an actively maintained version, customers must update to a newer QRC version.
- SAP will continue to provide the support defined in your contract for all available QRC versions, including those that are out of maintenance.

I hope that the information provided will serve as a valuable guide for the seamless operation of your SAP HANA Cloud instance, ensuring a smooth and uninterrupted experience.

entry.title: Re: First Date field not visible in Mass changes of Sales...
entry.content: Please try the same steps with this CDS ISDMCCCHGITEMB and try to extend Mass Change of Sales Document.

entry.title: Re: Sales Promotions & Sales Deals Configurations and Applying Multiple Deals to an Order
entry.content: Wonderful!a detailed and instructive article 👏

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Mashup Issue
entry.content:
Try validating the below.

- Whitelisting the ECP domain in HTTP_WHITELIST_S table. The latest *payroll.cloud.hr.sap are not coming in default with instance provisioning.

- Delete the cache and cookies and try again. Use private/incongnito

- Use a different browser

- Check the authorizations in ECP and Odata service.

entry.title: Re: Expense Waterfall is upside down
entry.content:
@ekov514 

This is currently by design. All accounts with Account Types EXP will shown as inverted. If you want to flip them just create a calculated account by adding a calculation and then point it to the original expense account.

You can see the 2 WF charts side by side, The one one the right uses the calculated account and on the left uses original account.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Signavio Active Users list
entry.content: Do you now why these reports are not activated by default ? Are there some other interesting reports which must be requested to be activated ?

entry.title: Re: BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order at ite...
entry.content:
Hi, if You want to explode BOM on printout You have two options:

  • explode this on sales order
  • create custom code on printout to search for component of BOM

entry.title: Archiving and Deleting Data from OpenText Tables in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We need to archive and delete old data (2011–2018) from two large OpenText tables in our S/4HANA system, while retaining only the last 5 years:

1. /OTX/PF01_T_1IMG – Stores invoice images and document metadata.
2. /OTX/PF02_T_IMGF – Contains process-related document details.
Total size: 0.7TB.

Challenges & Questions:
1. Is there a standard OpenText archiving object for these tables in SARA?
2. If not, what’s the best way to archive before deletion? 
3. What is the best way to delete large amounts of data in SAP HANA while minimizing system impact?
Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Create an API in SAP API Management to upload file without using Postman
entry.content:
Hi Sumandeep,

I have an issue uploading the file through API management.

When i upload a pdf and insert it in salesforce it woks perfect.

When i upload a png or jpg file the preview of salesforce is not working because API Management upload process adds the header in the upload file and this prevents the correct image source in salesforce.

When i downoad the file from salesforce remove the first 4 lines and the last line manually and save it as png, or jpg it works.

How can i prevent the headers added in the uploaded image payload.

One more thing, i do not get the images in attachment but in the IFlow body. How can i get it in the attachment.

Any suggestion is appreciated.

Regards,

Antony

entry.title: Standard Return CBAR - Replacement Material
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

 

We want to supply the replacement material for a Standard Return Order CBAR from Stock.

Is this possible?

I was not able to find this in the SAP Best Practice Process description.

 

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

Hello,

you can define the date control e.g. in the business partner. See screenshot:

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: Custom Business configurations for S/4 HANA 2023 private cloud edition: Some tips & Tricks
entry.content:
@LeonardP : You can try to publish locally from within the ADT, only in S4HANA private cloud or on-prem we need to use this t.code.

IF you face any errors, please share here so that experts can have a look at it.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Use Destinations During Local Development for Second API
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am currently working on a UI module of a mta project. 

In my application I have two APIs, the default OData service and a REST API and I have maintained instance level destinations in BTP and calling the APIs when the app is running on BTP is totally fine.

I followed this blog and maintained a subaccount level destination as I am using managed app router.

However, when I call the APIs during local development, only the OData is working but the REST API is returning a Http 401 error.

This is my ui5.yaml

 

  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: false # If set to true, certificate errors will be ignored. E.g. self-signed certificates will be accepted
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
        backend:
          - path: /odata
            url: <odata hostname>.com
          - path: /workflow/rest
            url: <REST API hostname>.com

 

My xs-app.json

 

  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/odata/v2/(.*)$",
      "target": "/odata/v2/$1",
      "destination": "odata_dest",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },  
    {
      "source": "^/workflow/(.*)$",
      "target": "/workflow/$1",
      "destination": "rest_api_dest",
      "csrfProtection": false
    }
  ]

 

The code to call the api

 

wfRequests = await Helper.callRest("/workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances" + query, "GET");

 

Appreciate if you could provide me some input.

Best Regards,

HB

entry.title: Re: Personas White list Issue
entry.content: Hello Experts, Any solution for this?

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
Hi Deshmukh,

it's great that you find it useful, and I totally agree with you, the material here is very interesting and it's easy to open the blog pretty much anywhere and start reading and learn something.

The reason for the blog is because, in my daily work, I am working with the new stuff from SAP, and in all my 26 years of doing SAP I have never seen the velocity of new technology to be so high, and horizontally so wide. When I started doing SAP people used to say SAP is complicated, but in the last 2 years the complexity has 10x'd. In the old days for example NW2004, ok you install XI and it is something new, but now, to do something new you have to take care of deploying that thing, integrating/connecting it, securing it, making it accessible to Users, and across a vast number of technologies to enable something to work end to end. As I said in the introduction, as the Front-End gets simpler  the backend complexity goes up exponentially.

And so, although I keep copies of all of the documents I read as I do my work, and put them in folders and organise them, I find that when trying to show other people so many diverse subjects, that even I struggle to quickly find where I stored "that" SAP ppt which explains what I want to show. And so, by making this "1 pager" I have everything on one page and I can search the page for that item, everything is in one place, and this is really accelerating me and my work.

And so, if this helps other people then that's great.

This page is now a  non-stop work in progress, because everything new that I am doing is immediately added to this page to make it easy for me to find it.

Having said all of that, SAP get it, and are on it, and the next thing we need to implement is....

SAP Joule for Consultants....

https://app.goconsensus.com/api/mps/media/b7e12cba-9d32-478d-8efa-bb64a27b364f?download

Webinar - How Joule simplifies SAP Consultants: Joule for SAP Consultants  

https://play.goconsensus.com/b77c71867?fn=*%7CURL:FNAME%7C*&ln=*%7CURL:LNAME%7C*&em=*%7CURL:EMAIL%7C...

because Joule for SAP Consultants promises to solve the challenges that we are currently facing 🙂

All the best,

Andy.

entry.title: Re: MaxDB Dababase Studion 7.9.11.08 Instalation
entry.content: Hi Will version 7.9.11.10 also be available as a community version?

entry.title: How to transfer the remaining budget difference in the Purchase Order (PO) to the Not Release status
entry.content: How can the budget difference between the Purchase Requisition (PR) and Purchase Order (PO) not be immediately returned to the available budget but instead be set to the Not Release budget status? Additionally, what configurations need to be made in Funds Management (FM) in SAP?

entry.title: Re: ChaRM Requested end date definition
entry.content:
The answer was found from note  1637914 Date not calculated due to empty calculation time

Even we have different case, rule exist but value was wrong we could solve this by that note. 

Thanks for helping!

SAP Solution Manager

entry.title: Re: SAML and 2212795
entry.content: That sounds like the way to solve the problem. You are talking about "Section 06 - Customization of SAML via Security Context document" in note 2791348? How do I enter more than one URL here?

entry.title: Re: Payment Confirmation to Customer
entry.content:
I guess those is not in sap standard.

I would recommend you own implementation. Select payment information from reguh and regup. Then use the class cl_bcs for sending email. A junior programmer can do that 🙂

entry.title: Re: Different Papersize between CR Designer and RAS
entry.content: No Don, it was not a new topic, it was an additional question concerning ModifyPrintOptions, please take a look :-). btw. the problem concerning the paper orientation is a bug for me, please give a reminder to R&D.

entry.title: Transport Management from quality to production system
entry.content:
Hello DM experts,

I have a question regarding the transport of configuration settings in SAP DM. Specifically, can settings within the manufacturing configuration area, such as data fields, data types, custom datas, or custom XSLTs used in workflows, be transported from the quality to the production system? And if so, how is this achieved?

On the SAP Help Portal, I only found information about the import/export of PODs and production processes. Is there any documentation that details the overall transport management strategy, including prerequisites and any limitations?

Thanks for any advice.

Best regards Gizem

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS, sap/hana-client and SAP HANA on-prem: “Canno...
entry.content: I'm not an expert for this hana-client library, but you need to somehow specify that the connection should be tunnelled via Cloud Connector. I have found something like proxy_scp_account and proxy_userid here.

entry.title: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content:
Hello all, 

Can anyone help me resolve the issue I'm facing? I need to calculate the value of Revenue NA [DRV0060] by multiplying the lookup price and units, but the resulting values are incorrect. I'm implementing this using scripting in a data action, and the values appearing are significantly lower than the expected ones, which are simply obtained by multiplying the two factors. I suspect the issue is due to improper aggregation at the hierarchical level. 

Script I am using 
DATA([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0060") =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0055") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0020")

below are the incorrect values

entry.title: Unable to use SAP HANA Application Migration Assistant Template in SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When I am trying to migrate my artifacts or Data from NEO to CAP Using the Template provided by SAP i.e. SAP HANA APPLICATION ASSISTANT but I am facing the below issue while trying to select the source type as "Delivery Unit" and If I select the Package name I get the same issue when I enter any package name.

I was referring the details from below link : 
Migration
